name: Attack Potion
effect: Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
effect_sacred_bark: Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add two copies of it to your hand. They cost 0 this turn.

name: Blessing of the Forge
effect: Upgrade all cards in your hand for the rest of combat.

name: Blood Potion
effect: Heal for 20 (40)% of your Max HP.

name: Colorless Potion
effect: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
effect_sacred_bark: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add 2 copies of it to your hand. They cost 0 this turn.

name: Distilled Chaos
effect: Play the top 3 (6) cards of your draw pile.

name: Duplication Potion
effect: This turn, your next card is played twice.
effect_sacred_bark: This turn, your next two cards are played twice.

name: Elixir
effect: Exhaust any number of cards in your hand.

name: Entropic Brew
effect: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.

name: Essence of Darkness
effect: Channel 1 (2) Dark for each orb slot.

name: Fairy in a Bottle
effect: When you would die, heal to 30 (60)% of your Max HP instead and discard this potion.

name: Flex Potion
effect: Gain 5 (10) [Strength]. At the end of your turn, lose 5 (10) [Strength].

name: Gambler's Brew
effect: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Liquid Memories
effect: Choose a card in your discard pile and return it to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
effect_sacred_bark: Choose 2 cards in your discard pile and return them to your hand. They cost 0 this turn.

name: Power Potion
effect: Choose 1 of 3 random Power cards to add to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
effect_sacred_bark: Choose 1 of 3 random Power cards to add two copies of it to your hand. They cost 0 this turn.

name: Skill Potion
effect: Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards to add to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
effect_sacred_bark: Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards to add two copies of it to your hand. They cost 0 this turn.

name: Smoke Bomb
effect: Escape from a non-boss combat. Receive no rewards.

name: Snecko Oil
effect: Draw 5 (10) cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your hand.

name: Speed Potion
effect: Gain 5 (10) [Dexterity]. At the end of your turn, lose 5 (10) [Dexterity].
